title: Jatidne Party Bag Fillers for Kids Temporary Tattoo Stickers 300 styles(25 Sheets) Mixed Design(Dinosaur, Unicorn, Butterfly, Car, Space) for Boys and Girls Party Favours Kids Party Games
features: 【Tattoos for Kids Party Bags】They are a huge hit in party bags and kids would love to play it on hands and cheeks, very fun!
【Mixed Designs for Boys and Girls】These fake tattoos have 5 designs: dinosaur, unicorn, cars, butterfly, space, great both for boys and girls
【Easy to Apply: 】Cut out the pattern you choose then Just place face down on skin and dampen with water. Hold it down for about 15 seconds and remove it
【Glow in The Dark】Compare to normal temporary tattoos, these tattoos make bedtime more fun.
【Warm Tips】Make sure the tattoos with a flashlight for approx 30 second or exposed to sunlight for a while
description: Product Description Jatidne 25 sheets party bag fillers for kids temporary tattoos for party bags mixed designs party favours for boys and girls (dinosaur, unicorn, space, butterfly, cars) Glow in the Dark Tattoos for Kids Party Supplies! Huge Hit in Party Bags! It's perfect for: Birthday Party， Baby Shower， Cosplay Party， Christmas， Easter， Halloween What would happened if your party have these tattoos? every guests love them, everyone want at least one on their face or arm. Package Included: 5 sheets dinosaur tattoos 5 sheets unicorn tattoos 5 sheets car tattoos 5 sheets butterfly tattoos 5 sheets space tattoos How to use: Clean the skin, apply the tattoo face down and wet the back of the tattoo Press the tattoos in 20 seconds then move away paper! you get the most stylish and magical tattoo How to remove: 1. Rub the Temporary Tattoo with alcohol or makeup remover or cold cream or baby oil and then wait 10 seconds. 2. Rub again gently and repeatedly until the tattoo has disappeared or by scrubbing it off with soap and water CAUTION: Do not apply to sensitive skin, near eyes or if allergic to adhesive. Also not recommended for children under 3 years old.
